response: This function implements the **Knuth-Morris-Pratt (KMP) string matching algorithm**, which finds the first occurrence of a pattern in a text in O(n + m) time. It first preprocesses the pattern to build a **Longest Prefix Suffix (LPS) array**, then uses this table to skip redundant character comparisons by intelligently shifting the pattern forward on mismatches, eliminating the need to backtrack through the text.
